steps.summary: Defined the first ingestion connector contract in docs/reports/2026-07-05-msi1-connector-contract.md: support document_metadata and structured_fact records, keep law locator as document metadata subtype, reserve docs/ingestion/source_manifest.example.json for MSI2, and require recursive forbidden-field validation before any body/API ingestion.

Implemented metadata-only ingestion manifest prototype: docs/ingestion/source_manifest.example.json contains 3 public-safe document_metadata records; kifrs/ingestion/manifest.py and scripts/validate_ingestion_manifest.py validate policy, source_id, storage/citation roles, required fields, and recursive forbidden fields; tests/test_ingestion_manifest.py covers accept, forbidden body field reject, and unknown source_id reject.

Added opendart-structured-financials as a collection_seed fact source, added 2 synthetic structured_fact records to docs/ingestion/source_manifest.example.json, hardened structured fact validation for numeric value/dimensions/locator/quality_flags and fact_evidence/public_synthetic_fixture boundaries, and expanded tests for accept/raw dump reject/shape reject.

Implemented provenance/citation evidence manifest: docs/ingestion/evidence_manifest.example.json links 3 evidence items to source manifest records; kifrs/ingestion/evidence.py and scripts/validate_ingestion_evidence.py validate source-record references, role/storage consistency, external role boundary, and recursive forbidden fields; tests cover accept, unknown record reject, role mismatch reject, and copied quote reject.
